title: update_space_fully single-transaction atomicity for both prop and member writes should be defended
description: update_space_fully wraps prop updates and member inserts/deletes in one SQLite transaction with a single state-token bump per type. A future contributor might split this back into separate store calls (update_space_props + upsert_space_member_with_role) to 'simplify'. That would reintroduce the pre-existing partial-write bug: name change committed, then member op fails → notUpdated returned but name already persisted. The previous version of this code had this bug and documented it as a 'known limitation'. The combined transaction is the fix; preserve it.
close_reason: decision recorded in beads, no code action needed
